summary: Implement role-based restrictions and capabilities for mobile users, specifically limiting TECH role to view-only status coloring while granting PM role enhanced object editing, commenting, and gallery management.

plan.title: Update Schema and Types for Comments
plan.description: Add 'comments' field to EditorObject interface in client/src/lib/types.ts and ensure shared/schema.ts supports storing these within the project state JSON.

plan.title: Role-Based UI Filtering in Home Page
plan.description: Modify home.tsx to detect 'isMobile' and 'user.role'. If role is TECH and isMobile is true, hide Sidebars (LayerPanel, PropertiesPanel) and the AddObjectPanel.

plan.title: Disable Canvas Interactions for Mobile TECH
plan.description: Update Canvas.tsx and ObjectRenderer.tsx to disable dragging, resizing, and drawing tools when the user is a TECH on a mobile device.

plan.title: Enable Status Coloring for TECH on Mobile
plan.description: Ensure the 'Color by Status' toggle is available in the MobileBottomBar or a simplified mobile menu for TECH users.

plan.title: Enhance Mobile PM Object Editing
plan.description: Modify PropertiesPanel.tsx (or create a MobilePropertiesDialog) to allow PMs to edit labels, add/view comments, and manage the ObjectPhotoGallery on mobile.

plan.title: Implement Mobile Comment System
plan.description: Create or update a component to allow PMs to input and display comments for a selected object on mobile.

acceptance_criteria.description: On mobile devices, users with role 'TECH' cannot see or open LayerPanel or PropertiesPanel sidebars.
acceptance_criteria.how_to_verify: Check conditional rendering in client/src/pages/home.tsx for TECH role + isMobile.

acceptance_criteria.description: Object dragging and resizing (react-rnd) is disabled for TECH role on mobile.
acceptance_criteria.how_to_verify: Verify 'disableDragging' and 'enableResizing={false}' props in ObjectRenderer.tsx when role is TECH and isMobile is true.

acceptance_criteria.description: The 'Color by Status' feature is accessible to TECH users on mobile via the UI.
acceptance_criteria.how_to_verify: Confirm MobileBottomBar.tsx contains a toggle or button for status coloring visible to TECH role.

acceptance_criteria.description: PM users on mobile can edit the 'name' (label) field of a selected object.
acceptance_criteria.how_to_verify: Check for an enabled Input or Textarea for 'name' in the mobile properties view for PM role.

acceptance_criteria.description: PM users on mobile can view and add photos via the ObjectPhotoGallery component.
acceptance_criteria.how_to_verify: Verify ObjectPhotoGallery.tsx is rendered and functional for PM role on mobile.

acceptance_criteria.description: The EditorObject type in types.ts includes an optional 'comments' string or string array.
acceptance_criteria.how_to_verify: Inspect client/src/lib/types.ts for the presence of 'comments' field in EditorObject interface.

acceptance_criteria.description: Drawing mode is forced to 'select' and tool selection is disabled for TECH role on mobile.
acceptance_criteria.how_to_verify: Check dispatch logic or tool filtering in Toolbar.tsx/MobileBottomBar.tsx for TECH role on mobile.

risks: Race conditions if role state isn't immediately available on page load.
Mobile detection (use-mobile.tsx) might not catch all tablet devices correctly without viewport adjustments.
Hardcoded role strings ('TECH', 'PM') might diverge from database values if not centralized in schema.ts.
